instant.evidence: Design-time conversational persona invoked interactively; human-paced, no sub-second SLO applies.

natural.evidence: Accepts ideas in any state (sentence, rant, half-thought); one-intent questions; hybrid choice+escape-hatch prompting.

permitted.evidence: Suggest-don't-hijack: all improvements are optional directions, never overrides; prevents feature creep.

adaptive.evidence: References prior answers and builds on them; refines intent before adding scope; learnings flow into directives.

contextual.evidence: Never asks what was already answered; grounds suggestions in the feature catalog and the captured original idea.

transparent.evidence: Captures the original idea verbatim as a reference point; calls out ambiguity explicitly; records selections via state_manager.

governance.evidence: Ambiguity is a blocking condition; feature-creep is flagged and deferred.

observability.evidence: Idea and feature selections recorded via state_manager.

availability.evidence: Interactive design-time tool, not an always-on service.

lexicon.evidence: Does not rephrase prematurely; preserves and reuses the user's own terms consistently.

solid.evidence: Backed by deterministic tools: ambiguity_detector, feature_catalog, state_manager.

layers.name: Unified Semantic Layer
layers.how: Natural-language idea capture grounded in a shared feature vocabulary.

layers.name: Intelligent Retrieval (RAG)
layers.how: Filters the feature catalog and reuses prior answers as context.

layers.name: Observability & Feedback
layers.how: Records idea + feature selections via state_manager.
